MIME-Version: 1.0
From: Samsung Wallet/Pay <pay.noreply@wallet-email.samsung.com>
Date: Fri, 10 Oct 2025 03:45:24 +0000
Subject: Samsung Wallet Device Registration
Message-ID: <01000199cc39313d-70a0cee4-02a7-4e23-92fa-3902b5b9b397-000000@email.amazonses.com>
Content-Type: multipart/mixed; boundary="----=_Part_10685667_711349495.1760067924257"

<html><head><title>Samsung Wallet</title>   </head>   <body style="padding:0; margin:0;">   <div style="margin:16px;color:#666">    <div style="border-bottom:3px solid #1428A0;padding:10px 0 16px;">        <a href="#"><img src="https://smps-resource.s3.amazonaws.com/pay/sys/prd/logo_samsungwallet.png" style="width:300px" alt="SAMSUNG Wallet" align="absmiddle" border="0" /></a>      </div>        <div class="" style="padding:16px 0 10px;">        <div style="text-align: center;"><img src="data:image/png;base64," alt="" /></div><div style="text-align: center;"><p>Dear Emil Skogsund,</p><p>Thank you for registering Samsung Wallet on your SM-S921B.</p><p>You now have 1 device(s) registered to use Samsung Wallet.</p><p>If you would like more information or have any questions, please visit the Samsung Pay <a href="https://www.samsung.com/se/wallet/">website</a>.</p><p>Warm regards,<br />The Samsung Wallet Team</p></div>       </div>       <div class="footer" style="display:block;text-align:center;color:#a8a8a8;padding:8px 16px 10px;border-top:3px solid #1428A0;background:#fafafa;">        <p style="font:11px 'Arial', 'Malgun Gothic';">This email is being sent to notify you of important changes to your Samsung Wallet app. Please do not reply to this email.</p>       </div>  </div>   </body>   </html>
